visual_description: In a glass-walled conference room, five men in light-colored shirts and dark trousers sit around a large black table, while a man in a white shirt and black trousers stands near the doorway with his arms crossed. The seated men have papers, mugs, and a black cap on the table; one man writes on a pink sheet, another looks at a document, and a third leans forward. In the background, a television displays a blue screen, and a woman can be seen working at a desk through the glass.
audio_description: The audio consists of a calm, measured male voice speaking to the group, accompanied by faint rustling of papers and occasional clink of mugs.
